since_last: 39% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.52%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.13% · Gold +0.74% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 39% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.52%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.52%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.73%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +5.31%, FTNT +1.24%, SAP +1.15%, ADBE +1.13%, ADBE +1.13%. Laggards: MU -5.73%, ARM -4.84%, MRVL -4.70%, TER -4.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.03% at $149.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
